title: pouzolzia sanguinea var. nepalensis
intro: Pouzolzia sanguinea var. nepalensis, also known as Nepal Pouzolzia or Nepal Redweed, is a plant species native to the Himalayas, classified under the family Urticaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pouzolzia sanguinea var. nepalensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from respiratory problems and skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, which are believed to enhance its therapeutic properties.
